Tool description: Make line-based edits to a text file. Each edit replaces exact line sequences with new content. Returns a git-style diff showing the changes made. Only works within allowed directories.

When not to use: ["Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.", "Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.", "Do not use when required inputs are missing."]
Argument template: {"path": "data/sample.txt", "edits": [{}], "dryRun": false}
Examples: [{"scenario": "Minimal valid request that satisfies the required fields for edit_file", "arguments": {"path": "data/sample.txt", "edits": [{}], "dryRun": false}}, {"scenario": "Richer invocation that uses optional controls for edit_file", "arguments": {"path": "data/sample.txt", "edits": [{}], "dryRun": true}}]
